zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale於1398年9月9日出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，她的父親Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt28歲，母親Marie D'Alençon25歲。她於1416年8月12日與Graf Antoine de Vaudémont在法國洛萊莫瑟勒結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年4月19日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-度-帕可享年77歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale于1398年9月9日出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯时，她的父亲Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt28岁，母亲Marie D'Alençon25岁。她于1416年8月12日与Graf Antoine de Vaudémont在法国洛萊莫瑟勒结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年4月19日在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-度-帕可享年77岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾哈爾庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale was born on 9 September 1398, in Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt, was 28 and her mother, Marie D'Alençon, was 25. She married Graf Antoine de Vaudémont on 12 August 1416, in Moselle, Lorraine, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 April 1476, in Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 77, and was buried in Harcourt, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale est née le 9 septembre 1398, à Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Marie D'Alençon, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Graf Antoine de Vaudémont le 12 août 1416, à Moselle, Lorraine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1476, à Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale am 9. September 1398 in Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt 28 und ihre Mutter Marie D'Alençon 25. Sie hat am 12. August 1416 in Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich Graf Antoine de Vaudémont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. April 1476 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale è nata il il 9 settembre 1398 nel Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Marie D'Alençon, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Graf Antoine de Vaudémont il 12 agosto 1416, nel Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1476, nel Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumaleが1398年9月9日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourtは28歳，母Marie D'Alençonは25歳であった。1416年8月12日にフランスロレィヌモセルでGraf Antoine de Vaudémontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年4月19日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメノトレ-ダム-ドウ-パーックで77歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアハーコウルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale(이)가 1398년 9월 9일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie D'Alençon(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1416년 8월 12일 프랑스 로레이인 모셀에서 Graf Antoine de Vaudémont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 4월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 노트레-다-드-파르크에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에 묻혔다.

mn.9 September 1398–19 April 1476: 1398 оны Есдүгээр сарын 9–1476 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 19

pt.9 September 1398–19 April 1476: 9 de setembro de 1398–19 de abril de 1476
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale nasceu em 9 de setembro de 1398, em Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Marie D'Alençon, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Graf Antoine de Vaudémont em 12 de agosto de 1416, em Moselle, Lorraine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de abril de 1476, em Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale родилась 9 сентября 1398 г. в местности калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie D'Alençon, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Antoine de Vaudémont 12 августа 1416 г. в местности моселл, лорреаин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 апреля 1476 г. в местности нотре-дэме-ду-парк, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности харкоурт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.9 September 1398–19 April 1476: 9 de septiembre de 1398–19 de abril de 1476
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Harcourt Countess Of Aumale nació el 9 de septiembre de 1398, en Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean d'Harcourt VII, Comte d'Harcourt, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Marie D'Alençon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Graf Antoine de Vaudémont el 12 de agosto de 1416, en Moselle, Lorraine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1476, en Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Harcourt, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
